tasks.title: OpenClaw Autonomous AI Assistant Setup
notes: 2026-02-01 09:00:02 UTC: Deploy OpenClaw personal AI assistant on Proxmox with full automation scripts. Includes CLEO integration, Telegram/Discord channels, and financial controls via Privacy.com. Architecture: Gateway LXC + Exec Node with Docker.

tasks.title: Research and validate OpenClaw Gateway architecture
notes: 2026-02-01 09:06:35 UTC: Research current OpenClaw Gateway architecture, Docker patterns, configuration schema, and security primitives from 2026 documentation.

[COMPLETED 2026-02-01T09:07:28Z] Research completed. Created comprehensive OPENCLAW-RESEARCH-2026.md with current documentation on installation, configuration, security, channels, skills, and Docker deployment.

tasks.title: Create automated LXC provisioning script for Proxmox
notes: 2026-02-01 09:06:36 UTC: Implement Bash script to automate LXC container creation on Proxmox. Support Gateway (4c/8GB) and Exec Node (8c/16GB) profiles. Enable Docker nesting, configure static IPs, validate prerequisites.

[COMPLETED 2026-02-01T09:12:37Z] Created provision-lxc.sh with Gateway and Exec Node profiles. Supports --dry-run, --force, auto-downloads Debian 12 template, configures Docker nesting, static IPs, and SSH access.

tasks.title: Create Docker and dependencies setup script
notes: 2026-02-01 09:06:37 UTC: Implement script to install Node.js 22, pnpm, Docker, Docker Compose, GitHub CLI, and build tools inside LXC container. Verify all installations and ensure idempotency.

tasks.title: Create OpenClaw Gateway configuration generator
notes: 2026-02-01 09:06:49 UTC: Generate openclaw.json with secure defaults, gateway token, sandbox policy, exec security settings, and channel stubs for Telegram/Discord.

tasks.title: Create CLEO skill for OpenClaw integration
notes: 2026-02-01 09:06:50 UTC: Implement SKILL.md for CLEO task management. Document commands (find, show, session, complete), RCSD/IVTR lifecycle, exit code handling, and output requirements.

tasks.title: Create channel configuration script for Telegram and Discord
notes: 2026-02-01 09:06:51 UTC: Interactive script to configure Telegram and Discord channels. Prompt for bot tokens, validate format, update openclaw.json, set DM policy to pairing.

tasks.title: Create deployment runbook and validation tests
notes: 2026-02-01 09:06:53 UTC: Comprehensive runbook with pre-deployment checklist, step-by-step procedure, validation checkpoints, rollback procedures, and troubleshooting guide.

tasks.title: Debug and fix install.sh LXC creation failure
notes: 2026-02-01 17:07:54 UTC: Installer hangs at 'Creating LXC Container...' - need better error handling, verbose output, and proper exit codes

tasks.title: Standardize banners across all scripts to OPENCLAW powered by CLEO
notes: 2026-02-01 17:07:55 UTC: Update all script banners to show consistent branding: OPENCLAW powered by CLEO

tasks.title: Create comprehensive testing checklist and validation
notes: 2026-02-01 17:07:56 UTC: Document full testing procedure for LXC creation, dependencies, OpenClaw build, Doppler integration

tasks.title: Fix Container ID auto-detection in install.sh
notes: 2026-02-01 23:03:56 UTC: Current script defaults to 100 without checking existing containers. Must detect next available CTID like tteck scripts do. User should not need to use --advanced for basic configuration.

tasks.title: Implement tteck-style UI/UX for installer
notes: 2026-02-01 23:03:58 UTC: Add interactive prompts like tteck scripts: storage selection with list of available storages, CTID selection with next available shown, network configuration (DHCP/static), SSH enable/disable. Use whiptail or dialog for better UX.

tasks.title: Research and fix Doppler CLI authentication flow
notes: 2026-02-01 23:03:59 UTC: Current approach assumes service token passed as argument. Need to investigate: 1) How doppler login works 2) If we can use service token without login 3) Best practice for non-interactive container auth. May need post-install manual doppler login step.

tasks.title: Update to Debian 13.3 and Node.js 24
notes: 2026-02-01 23:04:00 UTC: Current script uses Debian 12 template and Node.js 22. Update to: Debian 13.3 (current as of Jan 10, 2026), Node.js 24 (current LTS). Ensure template download uses latest available version.

tasks.title: Add automatic package updates after LXC creation
notes: 2026-02-01 23:04:02 UTC: Script should run full apt update and upgrade after Debian install to ensure all packages are current before installing dependencies.

tasks.title: Create end-to-end installation test procedure
notes: 2026-02-01 23:04:13 UTC: Document full test procedure: fresh Proxmox, run installer, verify all components, test Doppler connection, test OpenClaw gateway, test NGINX proxy. Include expected outputs and troubleshooting.

tasks.title: Document fixes made during initial testing
notes: 2026-02-01 23:04:15 UTC: Document fixes already applied: 1) Removed silent error suppression 2) Added check_storage() validation 3) Visible pct create output on failure 4) New OPENCLAW/CLEO banner. Ensure these are in the committed code.
